---
id: create-space
title: "创建空间"
description: "创建一个空间。当 parentSpaceId 为空时创建顶级空间；不为空时，在该空间下创建子空间。"
sidebar_label: "创建空间"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"创建空间"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/spaces"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



创建一个空间。当 parentSpaceId 为空时创建顶级空间；不为空时，在该空间下创建子空间。

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["name"],"properties":{"parentSpaceId":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"父空间 ID。为空时创建顶级空间。"},"name":{"type":"string","minLength":1,"description":"空间名称，不能为空字符串。"}},"example":{"parentSpaceId":"space-home-001","name":"客厅"},"title":"CreateSpaceRequest"},"example":{"parentSpaceId":"space-home-001","name":"客厅"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"string","description":"新创建的空间
